title: Lukka Chuppi
subTitle: A group of friends meet after 14 years and reminisce about their college days. However, old unresolved issues crop up and change the group's dynamics.

title: Punnaram
subTitle: Raghavan and Chandrika take out a loan for an autorickshaw in the hope of making a decent living. However, they soon find themselves in dire straits trying to pay it back.

title: Man Of The Match
subTitle: A Christian priest takes two orphans, Raju and Jimmy, under his wing. However, he has trouble bringing them up due to financial difficulties.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Kottarathil Kutty Bhootham
subTitle: The lives of three children change drastically when they befriend a friendly spirit who helps them overcome their adversities. However, the spirit soon gets hunted by an evil sorcerer.

title: Doctor
subTitle: When a military doctor tracks down his former fiancee's kidnapped niece, he discovers a complex human trafficking ring in Goa. He then weaves an intricate trap to capture the perpetrators.

title: Manthrikan
subTitle: A woman with no memory of her past, falls in love with an exorcist, but they get separated soon after. Years later, he meets her again when a family calls him to exorcise a spirit.

title: Lokanathan I.A.S
subTitle: Lokanathan, an autorickshaw driver from the slums, works hard and becomes an IAS officer. He takes it up as a challenge to bring down a corrupt politician.

title: Anniyan
subTitle: Ramanujam, who suffers from multiple personality disorder, works as a lawyer by day and a vigilante at night. He uses tips from the 'Garuda Purana' as his tools to expose various antisocial elements.

title: Star
subTitle: Ardra's increasingly strange behaviour threatens her marriage to Roy. Convinced she is possessed, Ardra seeks help from Dr Deric, who endeavours to reveal the underlying truth.

title: Star
subTitle: Ardra's increasingly strange behaviour threatens her marriage to Roy. Convinced she is possessed, Ardra seeks help from Dr Deric, who endeavours to reveal the underlying truth.

title: Balloon
subTitle: Two friends, Chandru and Muthukoya who live in a village, get entangled in various situations as they navigate through romantic relationships, rivalry and betrayal.

title: Ottayadipathakal
subTitle: Sathi sacrifices her life to care for her younger brother, who has a mental illness. However, traumatic events follow when her brother dies mysteriously.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Kumbarees
subTitle: Shambu, a mechanic, is best friends with John and falls in love with Jincy. Unforeseen events ensue when the trio has an unusual encounter with Manu, Meera and Anil.

title: Thiru
subTitle: Amid having bad terms with his family and struggling to find the love of his life, Pazham, a delivery boy, finds solace in his best friend Shobana.

title: Maya Bazaar
subTitle: Balarama promises Subhadra to get his daughter married to her son. When he loses his kingdom to the Kauravas, Balarama has no choice but to break his promise.

title: Naranathu Thampuran
subTitle: Ananthan is in love with Hemalatha, a poor girl and they get married. Later, the government and their family plan to take over the palace unless they give birth to an heir.

title: Naanum Rowdydhaan
subTitle: Pandiyan, a policeman's son, falls in love with Kadhambari, a girl with hearing impairment. However, she agrees to have a relationship with him only if he helps her kill a gangster.

title: Tamaar Padaar
subTitle: ACP Pouran mistakes two innocent circus performers, Jumper Thambi and Tubelight Mani, to be dangerous terrorists and arrests them. Pouran realises his error only after the men are sentenced to death.

title: Tamaar Padaar
subTitle: ACP Pouran mistakes two innocent circus performers, Jumper Thambi and Tubelight Mani, to be dangerous terrorists and arrests them. Pouran realises his error only after the men are sentenced to death.

title: 1 by Two
subTitle: Ravi's life takes a dramatic turn when his twin brother dies in an accident. Soon, his anxieties start creeping up as an investigation begins to look for answers.

title: Hide N' Seek
subTitle: The peaceful life of a couple takes an unexpected turn with the entry of a stranger, who threatens to shatter their marital bliss.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Ormakalundayirikkanam
subTitle: Jayan, a schoolboy and son of a MP, strikes up a relationship with Bhasi, a tailor and staunch supporter of the Communist Party. Soon, he understands the reason behind Bhasi's constant anxiety.

title: Kakkakum Poochakkum Kalyanam
subTitle: Kunjananthan, a perpetually complaining man, repeatedly attempts suicide but fails each time. His life takes a turn when he gets a job and falls in love, yet his whining nature remains unchanged.

title: Thattathin Marayathu
subTitle: Vinod is madly in love with a Muslim girl, Aisha. Aisha, who gradually falls in love with Vinod, is disappointed to see their difference in religion acting as a barrier in their marriage plans.

title: Shajahanum Pareekuttiyum
subTitle: After a rich girl, Jiya, meets with an accident, she gets amnesia and is unable to remember the name of the man she loved. Taking advantage of her condition, two opportunists set out to woo her.

title: Villali Veeran
subTitle: Siddharthan, a greengrocer and sole breadwinner for his family, lives frugally until he meets the charming Narmada, upending his priorities.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.
